summary: Round 13 is a seven-game post-Origin slate. TipBot is live with a preview card, but no Mark Hughes Foundation charity bet is locked because Origin back-up calls and final 24-hour team updates still carry too much movement.

scoreboard.note: Cronulla lose Nicho Hynes, Briton Nikora and KL Iro, while Manly rest Haumole Olakau'atu and lose Tolu Koula. Home field keeps the Sharks narrowly on top, but this is not a charity-bet profile.
Kalyn Ponga has been confirmed to back up and Jacob Saifiti is good to go, while Parramatta are without Mitchell Moses and Junior Paulo. This is the cleanest shortlist read, pending price.
The Tigers regain Jahream Bula, Api Koroisau, Alex Twal and Heamasi Makasini, but Canterbury still look the steadier side if Matt Burton backs up as named.
Melbourne have Cameron Munster, Harry Grant and Trent Loiero under post-Origin watch. The Roosters also have multiple Origin back-up decisions, so the AAMI Park lean is real but fragile.
Payne Haas and Brendan Piakura are named to return, and the Broncos have enough spine quality even with Origin monitoring. The Dragons regain Moses Suli and Jacob Liddle but remain undermanned.
Canberra regain Ethan Strange, Hudson Young and Seb Kris while Jayden Brailey is out. North Queensland have Reuben Cotter and Murray Taulagi back, but the travel and Raiders home edge matter.

This is the round closer and the lowest-confidence tip. Penrith have Nathan Cleary, Isaah Yeo, Casey McLean and Brian To'o in reserve for monitoring, while the Warriors rest Mitch Barnett and Kurt Capewell and have lost Roger Tuivasa-Sheck.

liveAlerts.text: Round 13 preview is live: seven games across Friday 29 May to Sunday 31 May 2026.
Cleanest shortlist lean: Knights over Eels, with Ponga backing up and Parramatta missing Moses and Paulo.
No charity bet is locked yet; require confirmed price, stake, and final team news before moving the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger.
Origin back-up risk is highest in Storm v Roosters and Panthers v Warriors.
Sharks v Sea Eagles is a Friday danger game because both sides have late roster losses.
Do not overwrite the validated Round 12 5 from 5 result when wrapping Round 13.
